nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 波多黎各
nodes.summary: 波多黎各是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括Black curassow、White-crowned pigeon、Plain pigeon等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 小吸蜜蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 小吸蜜蜂鸟（Vervain hummingbird，学名 Mellisuga minima），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于波多黎各、Gallery forest，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: vielloti is found in both the Dominican Republic and Haiti on the island of Hispaniola and also smaller nearby islands. There is one sight report from Puerto Rico. The species inhabits almost every available landscape throughout its range except the interior of dense montane forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in gallery forest, dry forest, desert scrub-shrub, gardens, and even urban areas

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: vielloti is found in both the Dominican Republic and Haiti on the island of Hispaniola and also smaller nearby islands. There is one sight report from Puerto Rico. The species inhabits almost every available landscape throughout its range except the interior of dense montane forest
